title: GraphDialog: Integrating Graph Knowledge into End-to-End Task-Oriented Dialogue Systems
research_areas: T03 Dialogue, Conversational Systems, Chatbots, Human-Robot Interaction
T13 Knowledge discovery/representation (knowledge graphs, linked data, terminologies, lexicons, ontologies, etc.)
